description: A contractor access policy is debated in Q3, then formally approved in a different form by the board in November. Probe asks for the current policy. System must return the November board-approved version, not the Q3 draft discussion. Tests whether the system distinguishes resolved decisions from earlier discussion context.

messages.content: We're drafting a new contractor access policy. The proposal is: contractors get full VPN access for 90 days, renewed on manager approval. Legal wants to review before we finalize.
Noted. Draft contractor access policy: full VPN access for 90 days, renewed on manager approval. Pending legal review.
Legal flagged the 90-day full VPN access as too broad. They recommend scoped access per project with 30-day windows. We're still debating internally.
Updated. Legal recommends scoped access per project with 30-day windows instead of full VPN for 90 days. Still under discussion.
The team proposed a compromise: scoped VPN access for 60 days with automatic expiry and re-approval required. We're presenting this to the board next month.
Got it. Compromise proposal for board: scoped VPN access, 60-day window, automatic expiry, re-approval required.

The board approved the contractor access policy yesterday. Final version: scoped access per project, 45-day window, automatic expiry, re-approval by both project lead and security team. Effective December 1st. This is the official policy now.
Board-approved contractor access policy recorded. Scoped access per project, 45-day window, automatic expiry, re-approval by project lead and security team. Effective December 1st.
We're onboarding a new contractor next week. What is our contractor access policy?

memory_events.value: Scoped access per project, 45-day window, automatic expiry, re-approval by project lead and security team

previous_values.value: Full VPN access for 90 days, renewed on manager approval (draft, pending legal review)
Scoped access per project with 30-day windows (legal recommendation, under discussion)
Scoped VPN access, 60-day window, automatic expiry, re-approval required (compromise proposal for board)
Scoped access per project, 45-day window, automatic expiry, re-approval by project lead and security team (board-approved, effective December 1st)

probe.prompt: What is our contractor access policy?

ground_truth.current_value: Scoped access per project, 45-day window, automatic expiry, re-approval by project lead and security team

value_history.value: Full VPN access for 90 days, renewed on manager approval (draft)
Scoped access per project, 30-day windows (legal recommendation)
Scoped VPN access, 60-day window, automatic expiry (board proposal)
Scoped access per project, 45-day window, automatic expiry, dual re-approval (board-approved)

eval_rubric.notes: System must return the board-approved November policy, not any earlier draft. Returning draft details (90-day, full VPN, 30-day, 60-day, or manager-only approval) as the current policy is a false closure failure.

interference.description: Three earlier versions of the policy exist in memory with more total session time spent discussing them than the final approved version. Retrieval-only systems may rank the longer discussions higher.
